narrative:
Precinct Richland Township (precinct in Holmes County) has 603 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.9 percentage points.
